Container.Name: sharetab
Container.Overview:
ShareTab is an open-source, self-hosted Splitwise alternative with AI-powered receipt scanning.
All-in-one container: PostgreSQL is bundled inside — no external database required.
Features: - Group expense tracking with multiple split modes - AI receipt scanning: photograph a receipt, extract items, assign to friends - Pluggable AI providers: OpenAI, Claude, Meridian (Claude Max), Ollama, or OCR fallback - Cross-group dashboard with debt simplification - PWA installable on mobile - Magic link email authentication (optional)
Container.Description: Self-hosted Splitwise alternative with AI receipt scanning. All-in-one container with bundled PostgreSQL — no external database needed. Split expenses with friends using multiple modes (equal, percentage, shares, exact, item-level from receipts). Supports OpenAI, Claude, Meridian (Claude Max), Ollama, and OCR fallback for receipt extraction.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Host port to expose ShareTab on

Config.Name: Database Data
Config.Description: Path to store PostgreSQL data (persists across restarts)

Config.Name: Receipt Uploads
Config.Description: Path to store uploaded receipt images

Config.Name: Claude Data (meridian)
Config.Description: Persistent storage for Claude login data used by the meridian AI provider. Optional unless meridian is in AI_PROVIDER_PRIORITY.

Config.Name: ChatGPT OAuth Data (openai-codex)
Config.Description: Persistent storage for ChatGPT OAuth login data used by the openai-codex AI provider. Optional unless openai-codex is in AI_PROVIDER_PRIORITY.

Config.Name: NextAuth URL
Config.Description: The URL where ShareTab is accessible (e.g., http://your-server-ip:3000)

Config.Name: Auth Secret
Config.Description: Secret key for session encryption. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 32

Config.Name: NextAuth Secret
Config.Description: Same value as Auth Secret (required by NextAuth)

Config.Name: Auth Trust Host
Config.Description: Set to true when running on a local network or behind a reverse proxy

Config.Name: DB Password
Config.Description: Password for the bundled PostgreSQL user

Config.Name: DB User
Config.Description: Username for the bundled PostgreSQL database

Config.Name: DB Name
Config.Description: Name of the bundled PostgreSQL database

Config.Name: AI Provider Priority
Config.Description: Comma-separated provider priority chain, for example: openai-codex,meridian,openai,ocr. ShareTab uses the first available provider and falls back to the next provider if extraction fails. If ocr is omitted, it is appended automatically as final fallback.

Config.Name: OpenAI API Key
Config.Description: API key for OpenAI (required when openai is in AI_PROVIDER_PRIORITY)

Config.Name: OpenAI Model
Config.Description: OpenAI model for receipt scanning. Defaults to gpt-4o.

Config.Name: OpenAI Codex Model
Config.Description: Model for receipt scanning when openai-codex is in AI_PROVIDER_PRIORITY. Defaults to gpt-5.4.

Config.Name: Anthropic API Key
Config.Description: API key for Claude (required when claude is in AI_PROVIDER_PRIORITY)

Config.Name: Anthropic Model
Config.Description: Claude model for receipt scanning (claude/meridian providers). Options: claude-opus-4-6, claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-haiku-4-5-20251001

Config.Name: Meridian Port
Config.Description: Port for the embedded Meridian proxy (used when meridian is in AI_PROVIDER_PRIORITY). Change if port 3457 conflicts with another service.

Config.Name: Ollama URL
Config.Description: Ollama server URL (required when ollama is in AI_PROVIDER_PRIORITY)

Config.Name: Ollama Model
Config.Description: Ollama vision model for receipt scanning

Config.Name: Email SMTP Host
Config.Description: SMTP server for outgoing emails. Used for magic link sign-in and Meridian auth expiry alerts. Leave blank to disable email sending.

Config.Name: Email SMTP Port
Config.Description: SMTP port (465 for implicit TLS, 587 for STARTTLS)

Config.Name: Email SMTP User
Config.Description: SMTP username / email address

Config.Name: Email SMTP Password
Config.Description: SMTP password or app password

Config.Name: Email From
Config.Description: From address for sent emails

Config.Name: Google OAuth Client ID
Config.Description: Google OAuth client ID (optional — enables Google sign-in)

Config.Name: Google OAuth Client Secret
Config.Description: Google OAuth client secret

Config.Name: Admin Email
Config.Description: Email address of the admin user. Grants access to the /admin dashboard for managing users, groups, and storage, and receives Meridian auth expiry alerts when email is configured. Leave blank to disable admin features.

Config.Name: Login Rate Limit
Config.Description: Max login attempts per IP per hour. Increase for testing.

Config.Name: Registration Rate Limit
Config.Description: Max registration attempts per IP per hour.

Config.Name: Max Upload Size (MB)
Config.Description: Maximum receipt image upload size in megabytes

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Server log verbosity: debug | info | warn | error. Defaults to info.
